5 Mockup Designs for Ken
projectTasks.description:
Not a boatload, just 4/5 ideas. Don’t think I’m crazy but I like Green Pickle characters with eyes and hats and cane😂something cute and immature. Also Bananas….

 Also do you have ideas for hundred dollar bills….the money!!!!
And something to launch for Memorial Day….tanks, flags, Jets…..

I’m not directing I’m asking😂😂get creative as you want. 
Also on July 4th the nation celebrates 250 years of the US Military. 

Thanks for indulging me…….🤡
